description: Half-value-layer stack: Ir-192 capsule fires a gamma beam through four identical absorber plates; the beam thins and dims at each plate while bar readouts halve 1 -> 1/2 -> 1/4 -> 1/8 -> 1/16, with a 1 HVL thickness chip (0.5 in steel / 4.8 mm lead). Per-layer reveals let lessons stop at 3 HVL (1/8) or run all four (1/16).
